arts.ttl: Enzo Maresca handed major Chelsea blow as nightmare scenario emerges for Liverpool game
arts.sum: Chelsea and Enzo Maresca have been handed a double blow ahead of his side's Premier League game against Liverpool after the international break with both Wesley Fofana and Marc Cucurella suspended for that match. However, Chelsea will have to take on title hopefuls Liverpool without two members of the back-four who have started the majority of Premier League matches so far this season.

arts.ttl: Chelsea v Nottingham Forest player ratings
arts.sum: Chelsea v Forest ratings. The post Chelsea v Nottingham Forest player ratings appeared first on West London Sport.

arts.ttl: Chelsea next five fixtures compared to Arsenal, Aston Villa and Man City after Nottingham Forest
arts.sum: Liverpool have an interesting few fixtures coming up, with games against Chelsea and Arsenal the standout, either side of a trip to Germany to take on RB Leipzig in the Champions League. Going into the second international break of the season, football.london takes a look at the fixtures on the horizon for each of the teams in the top five of the Premier League table at the start of Sunday.

arts.ttl: Maresca press conference LIVE as Chelsea boss talks Madueke, Sanchez and draw
arts.sum: Hello and welcome to live coverage of Enzo Maresca's Chelsea press conference following the 1-1 draw against Nottingham Forest. You can follow what Maresca has to say in his post-match press conference right here as football.london football writer Rob Guest brings you live updates.

arts.ttl: Maresca pleased with Chelsea’s fighting spirit
arts.sum: Chelsea reaction. The post Maresca pleased with Chelsea’s fighting spirit appeared first on West London Sport.

arts.ttl: £5m Nottingham Forest star spotted with ‘slight limp’ after Chelsea draw as well as Gibbs-White
What Jadon Sancho and Callum Hudson-Odoi did before Chelsea vs Nottingham Forest
arts.sum: Chelsea forward Jadon Sancho and Callum Hudson-Odoi reunited before the Blues' Premier League clash with Nottingham Forest. Since moving to Forest, Hudson-Odoi has been working hard to rediscover his form and has featured in all of Nuno Espirito Santo's team's Premier League matches.

arts.ttl: ‘Brightest spark’: BBC Pundit says £29m man was Chelsea’s best player in 1-1 draw vs Nottingham Forest
arts.sum: Chelsea will no doubt be frustrated that they were not able to make it six wins in a row in all competitions today against Nottingham...

arts.ttl: Chelsea scout ANOTHER South American wonderkid
arts.sum: Chelsea are reportedly eyeing a move for Santos right-back JP Chermont as the youth revolution at Stamford Bridge continues. Following their failure to land Lima, Chelsea are now hoping to sign Chermont in 2025, according to CaughtOffside .

arts.ttl: Chelsea 1-1 Nottingham Forest: Chris Wood praised by Nuno Espirito Santo after Stamford Bridge stalemate
arts.sum: Nottingham Forest head coach Nuno Espirito Santo praises the influence of Chris Wood after the East Midlands outfit earn a 1-1 draw at Chelsea in the Premier League.
